glossary.title: Bureaucratic Hebrew, demystified
glossary.blurb: Common terms you'll see on official letters, with a transliteration so you can pronounce them when phoning the office.

about.title: About Mikhtav
about.body: Mikhtav is an educational guide to common Israeli bureaucratic letters. It does not republish any government data and is not legal advice — verify your specific letter with the issuing authority.

disclaimer: Educational information only — verify your specific letter with the issuing authority.
